artifact: Tacit Knowledge Extraction paper and official release acquisition

paper.title: Tacit Knowledge Extraction via Logic Augmented Generation and Active Inference
paper.extraction_method: pdftotext -layout; UTF-8 text with page breaks preserved

release.message: Add public repo setup and documentation
release.license_observation: No LICENSE file appears in the 22-file pinned archive; acquisition makes no license conclusion beyond this path inventory.
release.timing_boundary: The pinned official commit predates arXiv v1 publication by 14,531 seconds (4:02:11) on 2026-05-08. This makes it timing-appropriate release evidence, but does not prove that it is byte-identical to every artifact or configuration used for the paper results.
acquisition_observations: The archive contains the LAG and active_inference programs, provider adapters, prompts, ontology, SHACL shapes, one transcript example, and one active-inference fragment.

The archive contains no obvious committed paper-run result table, trajectory bundle, repeated-run output set, manual annotation table, or evaluation script by conservative 22-file path inventory; deep review must confirm release-paper correspondence.

LAG writes provider-generated Turtle but the acquired main program does not itself invoke an RDF parser or SHACL validator; the paper's ontology-compliance evaluation therefore requires separate release audit rather than being inferred from acquisition.
Provider calls require local credentials or Ollama. No provider was executed during acquisition.

text_spot_checks: title, authors, abstract, immutable arXiv v1 marker, and repository footnote context
system architecture and separation of source-grounded versus inferred elements
three-video proxy dataset, model/modalities, manual annotation protocol, and five-repeat claim
LAG and Active-Inference results, cost table, limitations/future validation, references, and final page
verification.source_archive_test: Python tarfile parse succeeded: 13 members and 12 regular files, including samplepaper.tex, bibliography, class/style assets, and six figures.
verification.release_archive_test: Python ZipFile CRC test succeeded for all 28 members (22 regular files); extraction and targeted README/main-program inspection succeeded.

acquisition_scope: Created verifiable local full-paper, immutable source, and timing-aware pinned-release evidence for the queued review while preserving its original review purpose. This is source acquisition and extraction verification, not a deep paper or repository review, benchmark replay, score reproduction, semantic-quality validation, expert-authorization finding, procedural-utility finding, cross-domain-transfer finding, production claim, or readiness claim.
